## Runtime.ChocolateLibrary.scaleRecipe() method

Scales a recipe to a target weight

**Signature:**

```typescript
scaleRecipe(id: RecipeId, targetWeight: Grams, options?: IRecipeScaleOptions): Result<IComputedScaledRecipe>;
```
